task_objective: Update documentation, remove contributor section, and add report screenshots.
design_decisions: Removed 'Contributing' section from README as requested.
Used chromium-browser CLI in headless mode to capture high-fidelity screenshots of the SPA report.
Added a 'Preview' section to the README with visual demonstrations of the Overview, Variables, and Missing values tabs.
Updated Features and Usage documentation to reflect new Excel support and custom title capabilities.
results: README.md is now up-to-date with current features and includes professional visual previews. Selenium dependencies were avoided by leveraging the system's chromium-browser CLI for screenshotting.
